title: Recipe
description: A production recipe. recipe_type controls which fields are active.

recipe_type.description: acreage=farm yield per acre; standard=input→output; extraction=resource tag yield.

output_good.description: For acreage and extraction: ID of the good produced.

base_yield_per_acre_per_tick.description: acreage only. Bushels/logs/etc per worked acre per tick.

inputs.description: standard only. Good IDs → quantity consumed per batch.

outputs.description: standard only. Good IDs → quantity produced per batch.

worker_days_per_batch.description: standard only. Labor days needed to complete one batch.

yield_per_worker_day.description: extraction only. Units of output_good per worker-day.

required_resource_tag.description: extraction only. The resource_tag the region cell must have.

required_building.description: Building ID required for this recipe to run. Null = no building needed.
